field_contract.repo_url: HTTPS URL of the public source repository.
field_contract.commit_hash: Immutable git commit hash or immutable snapshot digest.
field_contract.license: License text or SPDX-compatible identifier for the frozen excerpt.
field_contract.snapshot_digest: Digest over the exact runtime-visible snapshot files.
field_contract.evaluator_only_gold: Hidden expected answer and evaluator-only evidence, never injected into runtime.
field_contract.dependency_declaration_evidence: Expected declaration evidence class, path, and span contract.
field_contract.import_use_evidence: Expected import/use evidence class, path, and span contract.
field_contract.advisory_record: Frozen advisory record or allowed knowledge snapshot reference.

claim_boundary: An excerpt satisfying this schema is eligible for local public repo-level held-out evaluation, not official benchmark performance.
